settings.heading: Design it once. Sell it everywhere.
settings.text: Custom apparel, accessories, gifts, and print products made only after a customer orders. Discover ready designs or request a custom print, then your product is produced and shipped by our print partner.
settings.image_alt: Custom apparel and print-on-demand product mockups
settings.step_1: Choose a product, size, color, and design.
settings.step_2: We review artwork and send it for printing.
settings.step_3: The product is printed, packed, and shipped.
settings.product_chips: T-shirts, Hoodies, Mugs, Posters, Tote bags

settings.title: Apparel
settings.description: T-shirts, oversized fits, polos, hoodies, sweatshirts, and kids wear.

settings.title: Accessories
settings.description: Caps, tote bags, phone cases, laptop sleeves, and everyday carry.

settings.title: Home and gifts
settings.description: Mugs, posters, cushions, decor, pet products, and gifting bundles.

settings.title: Business prints
settings.description: Cards, flyers, stickers, banners, labels, and marketing kits.

settings.heading: One design can become a full product line.
settings.text: Start with proven everyday products, test what customers love, and keep expanding without buying inventory upfront.

settings.title: Featured products
settings.description: Add your best launch products here once the catalog is imported.

settings.title: Customer places an order
settings.text: They pick the product, design, size, color, and quantity, then pay securely through Shopify checkout.

settings.title: Artwork is checked
settings.text: For custom items, the uploaded design is reviewed for print quality before production starts.

settings.title: Supplier prints and ships
settings.text: The print partner produces the item after purchase, packs it, ships it, and shares tracking.

settings.title: We handle support
settings.text: Customers get help with artwork, delivery questions, damaged items, and replacements.

settings.heading: A lean store model built for testing and scaling.
settings.text: No warehouse, no dead stock, no guessing which designs will sell. The site is designed to help customers understand the product, customize confidently, and check out smoothly.

settings.title: Made to order
settings.text: Products are printed after checkout, helping reduce waste and support a bigger design catalog.

settings.title: Custom friendly
settings.text: Upload artwork on eligible products or request a custom order for special prints and bulk needs.

settings.title: Support first
settings.text: Clear product details, artwork checks, tracked shipping, and help when an order needs attention.

settings.question: How long will delivery take?
settings.answer: Made-to-order products need production time before shipping. Add the final supplier timeline here after ordering samples and testing fulfillment.

settings.question: Can I order my own custom design?
settings.answer: Yes. Eligible products can include an artwork upload field. Use high-resolution PNG, JPG, or PDF files for the cleanest print result.

settings.question: What happens if the print arrives damaged?
settings.answer: Customers should contact support with photos and the order number. Replace this with your final replacement policy before launch.

settings.heading: Make the buying decision easy.
settings.text: Use transparent details around production, customization, shipping, and returns so customers know exactly what to expect.
